```text
     1тЖТ'use client'
     2тЖТ
     3тЖТimport type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4тЖТimport { useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5тЖТimport { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
     6тЖТ
     7тЖТimport { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
     8тЖТimport { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
     9тЖТ
    10тЖТimport { CommentBoxRoot } from './CommentBox/Root'
    11тЖТimport type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    12тЖТ
    13тЖТtype CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    14тЖТ
    15тЖТinterface CommentBlockThreadProps {
    16тЖТ  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
    17тЖТ  refId: string
    18тЖТ  anchor: CommentAnchor
    19тЖТ  onClose?: () => void
    20тЖТ}
    21тЖТ
    22тЖТfunction ThreadComment({ comment }: { comment: CommentWithAnchor }) {
    23тЖТ  const { avatar, author } = comment
    24тЖТ
    25тЖТ  return (
    26тЖТ    <div className="flex gap-2 px-3 py-2">
    27тЖТ      <Avatar
    28тЖТ        shadow={false}
    29тЖТ        imageUrl={avatar}
    30тЖТ        text={author}
    31тЖТ        size={24}
    32тЖТ        radius="full"
    33тЖТ        className="shrink-0 rounded-full"
    34тЖТ      />
    35тЖТ      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
    36тЖТ        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1.5">
    37тЖТ          <span className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-foreground/90">
    38тЖТ            {author}
    39тЖТ          </span>
    40тЖТ          <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
    41тЖТ            <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
    42тЖТ          </span>
    43тЖТ        </div>
    44тЖТ        {comment.anchor?.mode === 'range' && (
    45тЖТ          <div className="mt-0.5 border-l-2 border-accent/40 pl-2 text-xs italic text-muted-foreground">
    46тЖТ            {comment.anchor.quote}
    47тЖТ          </div>
    48тЖТ        )}
    49тЖТ        <p className="mt-0.5 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80">
    50тЖТ          {comment.text}
    51тЖТ        </p>
    52тЖТ      </div>
    53тЖТ    </div>
    54тЖТ  )
    55тЖТ}
    56тЖТ
    57тЖТexport function CommentBlockThread({
    58тЖТ  comments,
    59тЖТ  refId,
    60тЖТ  anchor,
    61тЖТ  onClose,
    62тЖТ}: CommentBlockThreadProps) {
    63тЖТ  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    64тЖТ  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    65тЖТ
    66тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
    67тЖТ    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    68тЖТ      const el = containerRef.current?.querySelector<HTMLElement>(
    69тЖТ        '[contenteditable="true"]',
    70тЖТ      )
    71тЖТ      el?.focus()
    72тЖТ    }, 50)
    73тЖТ    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
    74тЖТ  }, [anchor])
    75тЖТ
    76тЖТ  const handleAfterSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    77тЖТ    queryClient.invalidateQueries({
    78тЖТ      queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    79тЖТ    })
    80тЖТ    onClose?.()
    81тЖТ  }, [queryClient, refId, onClose])
    82тЖТ
    83тЖТ  return (
    84тЖТ    <div ref={containerRef} className="w-[400px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
    85тЖТ      {comments.length > 0 && (
    86тЖТ        <div className="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto py-1">
    87тЖТ          {comments.map((comment) => (
    88тЖТ            <ThreadComment key={comment.id} comment={comment} />
    89тЖТ          ))}
    90тЖТ        </div>
    91тЖТ      )}
    92тЖТ      <div className={comments.length > 0 ? 'border-t border-border/50' : ''}>
    93тЖТ        <CommentBoxRoot
    94тЖТ          refId={refId}
    95тЖТ          anchor={anchor}
    96тЖТ          afterSubmit={handleAfterSubmit}
    97тЖТ          compact
    98тЖТ          className="px-3 py-2.5"
    99тЖТ        />
   100тЖТ      </div>
   101тЖТ    </div>
   102тЖТ  )
   103тЖТ}
   104тЖТ
```

```text
     1тЖТimport type { BlockAnchor, RangeAnchor } from './types'
     2тЖТ
     3тЖТexport interface BlockInfo {
     4тЖТ  index: number
     5тЖТ  blockId: string
     6тЖТ  type: string
     7тЖТ  textContent: string
     8тЖТ  fingerprint: string
     9тЖТ}
    10тЖТ
    11тЖТexport function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
    12тЖТ  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    13тЖТ  let hash = 5381
    14тЖТ  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    15тЖТ    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    16тЖТ  }
    17тЖТ  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    18тЖТ}
    19тЖТ
    20тЖТfunction getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    21тЖТ  return node.type as string
    22тЖТ}
    23тЖТ
    24тЖТfunction getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    25тЖТ  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
    26тЖТ  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
    27тЖТ  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    28тЖТ    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
    29тЖТ  }
    30тЖТ  return ''
    31тЖТ}
    32тЖТ
    33тЖТexport function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
    34тЖТ  let parsed: Record<string, any>
    35тЖТ  try {
    36тЖТ    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    37тЖТ  } catch {
    38тЖТ    return []
    39тЖТ  }
    40тЖТ
    41тЖТ  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    42тЖТ    | Record<string, any>[]
    43тЖТ    | undefined
    44тЖТ  if (!rootChildren) return []
    45тЖТ
    46тЖТ  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    47тЖТ    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
    48тЖТ      | string
    49тЖТ      | undefined
    50тЖТ    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    51тЖТ    return {
    52тЖТ      index,
    53тЖТ      blockId: blockId || '',
    54тЖТ      type: getNodeType(child),
    55тЖТ      textContent,
    56тЖТ      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    57тЖТ    }
    58тЖТ  })
    59тЖТ}
    60тЖТ
    61тЖТexport function findBlockIndex(contentEl: Element, node: Node): number {
    62тЖТ  const { children } = contentEl
    63тЖТ  let current: Node | null = node
    64тЖТ  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    65тЖТ    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
    66тЖТ      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    67тЖТ        if (children[i] === current) return i
    68тЖТ      }
    69тЖТ      return -1
    70тЖТ    }
    71тЖТ    current = current.parentNode
    72тЖТ  }
    73тЖТ  return -1
    74тЖТ}
    75тЖТ
    76тЖТexport function getTextOffset(
    77тЖТ  container: Element,
    78тЖТ  targetNode: Node,
    79тЖТ  targetOffset: number,
    80тЖТ): number {
    81тЖТ  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(
    82тЖТ    container,
    83тЖТ    NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT | NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT,
    84тЖТ    {
    85тЖТ      acceptNode(node) {
    86тЖТ        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    87тЖТ        if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT
    88тЖТ        return NodeFilter.FILTER_SKIP
    89тЖТ      },
    90тЖТ    },
    91тЖТ  )
    92тЖТ  let offset = 0
    93тЖТ  let node: Node | null
    94тЖТ  while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
    95тЖТ    if (node === targetNode) {
    96тЖТ      return offset + targetOffset
    97тЖТ    }
    98тЖТ    if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
    99тЖТ      offset += (node as Text).length
   100тЖТ    } else if (node instanceof HTMLBRElement) {
   101тЖТ      offset += 1
   102тЖТ    }
   103тЖТ  }
   104тЖТ  return offset
   105тЖТ}
   106тЖТ
   107тЖТexport function buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(
   108тЖТ  sel: Selection,
   109тЖТ  contentEl: Element,
   110тЖТ  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   111тЖТ): RangeAnchor | null {
   112тЖТ  const { anchorNode, anchorOffset, focusNode, focusOffset } = sel
   113тЖТ  if (!anchorNode || !focusNode) return null
   114тЖТ
   115тЖТ  const anchorBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, anchorNode)
   116тЖТ  const focusBlockIdx = findBlockIndex(contentEl, focusNode)
   117тЖТ  if (anchorBlockIdx < 0 || focusBlockIdx < 0) return null
   118тЖТ  if (anchorBlockIdx !== focusBlockIdx) return null
   119тЖТ
   120тЖТ  const info = blockInfos[anchorBlockIdx]
   121тЖТ  if (!info?.blockId) return null
   122тЖТ
   123тЖТ  const blockEl = contentEl.children[anchorBlockIdx]
   124тЖТ  if (!blockEl) return null
   125тЖТ
   126тЖТ  let startOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, anchorNode, anchorOffset)
   127тЖТ  let endOffset = getTextOffset(blockEl, focusNode, focusOffset)
   128тЖТ  if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   129тЖТ    ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   130тЖТ  }
   131тЖТ
   132тЖТ  const text = info.textContent
   133тЖТ  const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   134тЖТ  if (!quote) return null
   135тЖТ
   136тЖТ  return {
   137тЖТ    mode: 'range',
   138тЖТ    blockId: info.blockId,
   139тЖТ    blockType: info.type,
   140тЖТ    blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
   141тЖТ    snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   142тЖТ    quote,
   143тЖТ    prefix: text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset),
   144тЖТ    suffix: text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50),
   145тЖТ    startOffset,
   146тЖТ    endOffset,
   147тЖТ  }
   148тЖТ}
   149тЖТ
   150тЖТexport function buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(
   151тЖТ  blockInfos: BlockInfo[],
   152тЖТ  index: number,
   153тЖТ): BlockAnchor | null {
   154тЖТ  const info = blockInfos[index]
   155тЖТ  if (!info?.blockId) return null
```

```text
   150тЖТ  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

   156тЖТ  })
   157тЖТ

   162тЖТ    setOpen(false)

   164тЖТ

   191тЖТ        }
   192тЖТ      }
   193тЖТ      case 'both': {

   198тЖТ          onMouseOut: handleMouseOut,
   199тЖТ        }
   200тЖТ      }

   210тЖТ      {

   213тЖТ    )
   214тЖТ  ) : (
   215тЖТ    <></>
   216тЖТ  )

   224тЖТ    )
   225тЖТ  ) : (
   226тЖТ    <As
   227тЖТ      // @ts-ignore
   228тЖТ      role={trigger === 'both' || trigger === 'click' ? 'button' : 'note'}
   229тЖТ      className={clsxm('inline-block', wrapperClassNames)}
   230тЖТ      ref={refs.setReference}
   231тЖТ      {...listener}
   232тЖТ    >
   233тЖТ      {Child}
   234тЖТ    </As>
   235тЖТ  )
   236тЖТ
   237тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
   238тЖТ    if (refs.floating.current && open && type === 'popover') {
   239тЖТ      refs.floating.current.focus()
   240тЖТ    }
   241тЖТ  }, [open])
   242тЖТ
   243тЖТ  useEffect(() => {

   246тЖТ    } else {
   247тЖТ      onClose?.()
   248тЖТ    }
   249тЖТ  }, [open])

   253тЖТ  )
   254тЖТ
   255тЖТ  if (!props.children) {

   257тЖТ  }
   258тЖТ
   259тЖТ  return (
   260тЖТ    <>
   261тЖТ      {TriggerWrapper}
   262тЖТ
   263тЖТ      <AnimatePresence>

   265тЖТ          <RootPortal to={to}>

   267тЖТ              onWheel={stopPropagation}
   268тЖТ              className={clsxm(

   271тЖТ                popoverWrapperClassNames,
   272тЖТ              )}
   273тЖТ              {...(trigger === 'hover' || trigger === 'both' ? listener : {})}
   274тЖТ              ref={containerRef}
   275тЖТ            >

   277тЖТ                tabIndex={-1}
```

```text
     1тЖТ// @copy https://github.com/streamich/react-use/blob/master/src/useClickAway.ts
     2тЖТimport type { RefObject } from 'react'
     3тЖТimport { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
     4тЖТ
     5тЖТfunction on<T extends Window | Document | HTMLElement | EventTarget>(
     6тЖТ  obj: T | null,
     7тЖТ  ...args: Parameters<T['addEventListener']> | [string, Function | null, ...any]
     8тЖТ): void {
     9тЖТ  if (obj && obj.addEventListener) {
    10тЖТ    obj.addEventListener(
    11тЖТ      ...(args as Parameters<HTMLElement['addEventListener']>),
    12тЖТ    )
    13тЖТ  }
    14тЖТ}
    15тЖТ
    16тЖТfunction off<T extends Window | Document | HTMLElement | EventTarget>(
    17тЖТ  obj: T | null,
    18тЖТ  ...args:
    19тЖТ    | Parameters<T['removeEventListener']>
    20тЖТ    | [string, Function | null, ...any]
    21тЖТ): void {
    22тЖТ  if (obj && obj.removeEventListener) {
    23тЖТ    obj.removeEventListener(
    24тЖТ      ...(args as Parameters<HTMLElement['removeEventListener']>),
    25тЖТ    )
    26тЖТ  }
    27тЖТ}
    28тЖТ
    29тЖТconst defaultEvents = ['mousedown', 'touchstart']
    30тЖТ
    31тЖТconst useClickAway = <E extends Event = Event>(
    32тЖТ  ref: RefObject<HTMLElement | null>,
    33тЖТ  onClickAway: (event: E) => void,
    34тЖТ  events: string[] = defaultEvents,
    35тЖТ) => {
    36тЖТ  const savedCallback = useRef(onClickAway)
    37тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
    38тЖТ    savedCallback.current = onClickAway
    39тЖТ  }, [onClickAway])
    40тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
    41тЖТ    const handler = (event: React.MouseEvent) => {
    42тЖТ      const { current: el } = ref
    43тЖТ      el &&
    44тЖТ        !el.contains(event.target as any) &&
    45тЖТ        savedCallback.current(event as any)
    46тЖТ    }
    47тЖТ    for (const eventName of events) {
    48тЖТ      on(document, eventName, handler)
    49тЖТ    }
    50тЖТ    return () => {
    51тЖТ      for (const eventName of events) {
    52тЖТ        off(document, eventName, handler)
    53тЖТ      }
    54тЖТ    }
    55тЖТ  }, [events, ref])
    56тЖТ}
    57тЖТ
    58тЖТexport default useClickAway
    59тЖТ
```

```text
    49тЖТ

    52тЖТ    floatingStyles,
    53тЖТ  } = useFloating({

    55тЖТ    middleware: [offset(8), flip({ padding: 20 }), shift({ padding: 20 })],
    56тЖТ  })
    57тЖТ
    58тЖТ  useClickAway(popoverRef, () => {
    59тЖТ    setCommentPopover(null)
    60тЖТ  })
    61тЖТ
    62тЖТ  const isLexical = contentFormat === 'lexical'

    67тЖТ
    68тЖТ  useEffect(() => {
    69тЖТ    const handler = (e: MouseEvent): void => {

    72тЖТ        return

    74тЖТ      if (ref.current?.contains(e.target as Node)) return

    96тЖТ
    97тЖТ  const canCopy = !useIsInBanCopyContext()

    99тЖТ  const actionCanActivated = canCopy || canComment
   100тЖТ
   101тЖТ  if (isMobile || !isClient) return children
   102тЖТ  if (!actionCanActivated) return children
   103тЖТ
   104тЖТ  const buildAnchorFromSelection = (sel: Selection): CommentAnchor | null => {
   105тЖТ    if (!isLexical || blockInfos.length === 0) return null
   106тЖТ    if (sel.isCollapsed) return null
   107тЖТ    const contentEl =
   108тЖТ      ref.current?.querySelector('[data-lexical-content]') ??
   109тЖТ      ref.current?.querySelector('.rich-content')
   110тЖТ    if (!contentEl) return null
   111тЖТ    return buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel, contentEl, blockInfos)
   112тЖТ  }
   113тЖТ
   114тЖТ  return (

   117тЖТ      ref={ref}
   118тЖТ      onMouseUp={(e) => {

   120тЖТ        if (!$) return
   121тЖТ
   122тЖТ        const selection = window.getSelection()
   123тЖТ        if (!selection) return
   124тЖТ        const selectedText = selection.toString()
   125тЖТ        if (selectedText.length === 0) return
   126тЖТ        const { top, left } = $.getBoundingClientRect()
   127тЖТ
   128тЖТ        cachedAnchorRef.current = buildAnchorFromSelection(selection)
   129тЖТ
   130тЖТ        setShow(true)
   131тЖТ        setSelectedText(selectedText)

   154тЖТ            exit={{

   156тЖТ              opacity: 0,
   157тЖТ            }}
   158тЖТ          >
   159тЖТ            {canCopy && (
   160тЖТ              <>
   161тЖТ                <MotionButtonBase
   162тЖТ                  data-event="selection-comment"
   163тЖТ                  className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   164тЖТ                  onMouseUp={stopPropagation}
   165тЖТ                  onClick={() => {
   166тЖТ                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(selectedText)
   167тЖТ                    setShow(false)
   168тЖТ                    toast.success(t('selection_copy_success'))
   169тЖТ                  }}
   170тЖТ                >
   171тЖТ                  {t('selection_copy')}
   172тЖТ                </MotionButtonBase>
   173тЖТ                <DividerVertical className="mx-1" />
   174тЖТ              </>
   175тЖТ            )}
   176тЖТ            {canComment && (
   177тЖТ              <MotionButtonBase
   178тЖТ                data-event="selection-comment"
   179тЖТ                className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   180тЖТ                onClick={() => {
   181тЖТ                  const anchor = cachedAnchorRef.current
   182тЖТ                  if (anchor) {
   183тЖТ                    const sel = window.getSelection()
   184тЖТ                    if (sel && sel.rangeCount > 0) {
   185тЖТ                      const range = sel.getRangeAt(0)

   187тЖТ                      floatingRefs.setReference({

   193тЖТ                  } else {

   196тЖТ                      content: (rest) => (
   197тЖТ                        <CommentModal

   199тЖТ                          title={title}
   200тЖТ                          initialValue={`> ${selectedText?.split('\n').join('')}\n\n`}
   201тЖТ                          {...rest}

   205тЖТ                  }

   207тЖТ              >
```
